segments.text: These are the words of Jeremiah son of Hilkiah, one of the priests in Anathoth in the territory of Benjamin.
The word of the LORD came to Jeremiah in the thirteenth year of the reign of Josiah son of Amon king of Judah,
and through the days of Jehoiakim son of Josiah king of Judah, until the fifth month of the eleventh year of Zedekiah son of Josiah king of Judah, when the people of Jerusalem went into exile.
The word of the LORD came to me, saying:

Before I formed you in the womb I knew you, and before you were born I set you apart
and appointed you as a prophet to the nations.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Ah, Lord GOD,
segments.speaker: Jeremiah

segments.text: I said,
I surely do not know how to speak, for I am only a child!
segments.speaker: Jeremiah

segments.text: But the LORD told me:
Do not say,‘I am only a child.’For to everyone I send you, you must go, and all that I command you, you must speak.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Do not be afraid of them, for I am with you to deliver you,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: declares the LORD.
Then the LORD reached out His hand, touched my mouth, and said to me:
Behold, I have put My wordsin your mouth.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
See, I have appointed you todayover nations and kingdomsto uproot and tear down, to destroy and overthrow,
to build and plant.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And the word of the LORD came to me, asking,
Jeremiah, what do you see?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I see a branch of an almond tree,
segments.speaker: Jeremiah

segments.text: I replied.
You have observed correctly,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: said the LORD,
for I am watching over My word to accomplish it.
segments.speaker: the Lord

footnotes.text: + The Hebrew for watching sounds like the Hebrew for almond tree.

segments.text: Again the word of the LORD came to me, asking,
What do you see?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I see a boiling pot,
segments.speaker: Jeremiah

segments.text: I replied,
and it is tilting toward us from the north.
segments.speaker: Jeremiah

segments.text: Then the LORD said to me,
Disaster from the north will be poured out on all who live in the land.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: For I am about to summon all the clans and kingdoms of the north,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: declares the LORD.
Their kings will come and set up their thronesat the entrance of the gates of Jerusalem. They will attack all her surrounding walls and all the other cities of Judah.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text:
I will pronounce My judgments against themfor all their wickedness, because they have forsaken Meto burn incense to other gods
and to worship the works of their own hands.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Get yourself ready. St and up and tell them everything that I command you. Do not be intimidated by them, or I will terrify you before them.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Now behold, this day I have made you like a fortified city, an iron pillar, and bronze walls against the whole land—against the kings of Judah, its officials, its priests, and the people of the land.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: They will fight against you but will never overcome you, since I am with you to deliver you,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: declares the LORD.
